buckets.label: Schema
buckets.description: Schemas, field dictionaries, and data contracts supporting parsing or validation.

buckets.label: Policy
buckets.description: Governance, PHI, review, and safety rules retrieved for the workflow.

buckets.label: Terminology
buckets.description: Controlled terminology and unit evidence such as LOINC, UCUM, RxNorm, or SNOMED CT.

buckets.label: FHIR mapping
buckets.description: FHIR resource, search parameter, and mapping evidence for clinical package output.

buckets.label: Source locators
buckets.description: Input rows, OCR boxes, document chunks, or other source-local evidence locators.

buckets.label: Prior decisions
buckets.description: Human decisions, audit events, or accepted transformations that can guide repeat work.

buckets.label: Other evidence
buckets.description: Retrieved evidence that does not fit a higher-priority clinical workflow bucket.
